summary: Iteration 3 frontend-only Playwright E2E run focused on per-project data isolation, chatbot reset-on-switch, and regression of all prior screens. All assertions PASSED. The 3 projects (MMRDA-2026-0142 Conditional / MMRDA-2026-0098 Clear / MMRDA-2026-0117 Disputed) each show a unique document corpus, validation decision card, gov-API states, RAG chunk IDs (p1/p2/p3 prefix), and chatbot scripted responses with correct citations. No console errors or page errors observed.
tests_executed: Login -> /dashboard redirect (auto pre-filled credentials)
P1 (Conditional) Workspace: 6 docs [p1-712, p1-pcard, p1-aadhaar, p1-saledeed, p1-mutation, p1-ec], badge='Title: Conditional'
P1 Validation decision card shows 'Conditional' with headline mentioning 'mortgage discharge'
P1 RAG pipeline: 5 chunks all prefixed 'chunk-p1-ch-*'
P1 Chatbot greeting mentions 'Virar' and '6 documents'; user-typed message rendered
Project switch P1->P2 via header switcher: chatbot conversation reset (no P1 user message), greeting now mentions 'Mumbai Trans Harbour' and '7 documents'
P2 (Clear) Workspace: 7 docs all p2-* (no p1-* leakage), badge='Title: Clear'
P2 Validation: decision='Clear' with 'ready for compensation' headline; 0 vchecks in REVIEW state (all 7 PASS)
P2 RAG pipeline: 5 chunks all prefixed 'chunk-p2-ch-*'
P2 Chatbot 'Is the title clear?' suggested-prompt -> 'Yes... Clear ...96.4%' with citations p2-ch-058 and p2-ch-074
P2 Chatbot header sub-text shows '198 chunks · 7 docs'
P3 (Disputed) Workspace: 9 docs all p3-* (no p1/p2 leakage), badge='Title: Disputed'
P3 Validation decision='Disputed' with 'Bombay HC Suit 4421/2025' headline
P3 Gov-API grid: ec=Failed, mahabhulekh/pan/gis=Warning, uidai/igrs=Verified (matches spec exactly)
P3 RAG pipeline: 5 chunks all prefixed 'chunk-p3-ch-*'
P3 Chatbot 'Is the title clear?' -> 'Disputed ... 71.2%' with citations p3-ch-128 and p3-ch-152
P3 Chatbot header sub-text shows '287 chunks · 9 docs'
Switch back P3->P1: workspace shows only p1-* docs (no p3-* residue)
Regression: /dashboard, /projects, /workflow, /valuation, /reports, /projects/new all render their primary data-testids
No console errors, no page errors during the entire run
critical_code_review_comments: useProjectData() hook is clean: derives data via getProjectData(project.id) and falls back to project 1 if id is unknown — good defensive default.
Workspace.jsx correctly resets selected document via useEffect on project.id change (line 24); no stale viewer.
Chatbot.jsx resets messages array on project switch via useEffect (line 34) — verified empirically (P1 user message disappears after switch).
RagPipeline.jsx replays the pipeline animation by resetting activeIndex to 0 on project change — verified.
Validation.jsx dynamically picks DECISION_TONE colour/icon by project.status — Clear=emerald/ShieldCheck, Conditional=amber/AlertCircle, Disputed=rose/AlertOctagon — all three render correctly.

Minor cosmetic: Validation.jsx 'Workflow' mini-stepper at lines 167-172 still hard-codes '6 / 6 docs uploaded' and 'Yavi.ai · 92.7% conf' — these are stale for projects 2 and 3. Not part of iteration-3 isolation spec but worth noting.

Minor cosmetic: PIPELINE_NODES in mockData.js still shows hardcoded '6 docs · 23 pages' and '165 chunks' subtitles — these labels render the same regardless of active project on /rag-pipeline. The dynamic stat cards above are correct, but the node sub-labels are static. Not blocking.
Per-project data file projectData.js is large (~480 lines) but well-organised by project block — acceptable for a static-mock demo.
All chunk ids, doc ids, project-switcher data-testids match the review-request spec exactly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all isolation, switch-reset, and regression assertions passed

test_credentials: Mock auth — pre-filled 'officer' / 'mmrda@2026', role 'Legal Officer'. localStorage keys: mmrda_user, mmrda_active_project.
seed_data_creation: None — all data is static per-project mock data in /app/frontend/src/data/projectData.js (3 projects).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-3 fully passes. Per-project data isolation is solid: switching active project completely swaps Workspace docs (p1-*/p2-*/p3-*), Validation decision card (Conditional/Clear/Disputed), Government-API states (P3 has 1 'error' + 3 'warning'), RAG sample chunks (p{1,2,3}-ch-*), and Chatbot greeting + scripted answers. The Chatbot also clears prior messages on project switch (verified). Two minor static-label leakages remain in (a) Validation.jsx mini Workflow stepper hardcoded '6 / 6 docs · 92.7% conf' and (b) PIPELINE_NODES subtitles in mockData.js — both non-blocking and not part of the iteration-3 isolation spec.
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration.
